perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a black cap stands in front of a grey curtain, gesturing excitedly toward the camera. (2) Scene shifts to a clinical setting where an elderly man lies in bed, looking at an iPad mounted above him. (3) Close-up of an iPad screen showing app icons moving and text being typed without physical touch. (4) Graphic animation of a silver mesh-like medical device appearing on a black background, representing a brain implant. (5) The elderly man is shown again, followed by another man in a wheelchair using a laptop. (6) Return to the man in the cap who continues to speak and gesture with his hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice starts speaking in an energetic and professional tone. Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic background music begins. (2) Ambient sound of a soft 'whoosh' effect plays during a scene transition. (3) The music continues at a steady volume while the male voice maintains a constant narrative flow. (4) A soft 'ding' sound effect occurs as text appears on screen. (5) The music and voice conclude together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c 有意思 tim 哥' (Functional: Channel name). (2) '蘋果 iOS 26' (Hook: Apple iOS 26). (3) '還支援腦控功能!?' (Hook: Also supports brain control!?). (4) '2025 春季' (Functional: Spring 2025). (5) 'iOS 26', 'iPadOS 26' (Functional: System versions). (6) '微創的內血管手術' (Functional: Minimally invasive endovascular surgery). (7) 'Calibration successful!' (Functional: Calibration successful). (8) Full Chinese subtitles follow the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host (Tim), 2 patients shown in demonstration footage.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian male with glasses, wearing a black newsboy cap and a white 'Roots' brand t-shirt.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro by host -> Demonstration of tech through footage -> Technical explanation -> Conclusion by host.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple grey curtain backdrop for the host; a domestic bedroom and an office-like setting for the demonstration footage.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Studio lighting on host, natural/ambient indoor light in footage.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share news and excite viewers about a future Apple technology (iOS 26) that integrates brain-computer interface (BCI) technology, specifically mentioning the use of minimally invasive surgery to help disabled users control devices with their minds.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is presented as a tech news update rather than a paid advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature newsboy cap and glasses, consistent use of variety-show style text hooks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses hypothetical 'iOS 26' branding as a hook to discuss existing BCI trials (like Synchron) that may integrate with future Apple ecosystems.
